steps.name: quality-audit
steps.summary: Add a Grade 1/2 mission-bank quality audit that fails on warnings before volume expansion.

steps.name: grade1-beta-bank
steps.summary: Expand Grade 1 adventure missions from 24 Alpha templates to 60 Beta templates.

steps.name: grade2-beta-bank
steps.summary: Expand Grade 2 missions from 36 Alpha templates to 72 Beta templates, six per unit.

steps.name: beta-ux-and-verification
steps.summary: Remove Alpha fixed-count UI copy, add reset confirmation, and verify through tests and browser QA.
